message:
fix(tests): wrap raw SQL inserts in transactions and isolate env overrides

Two test bugs caused by the test Dolt server running with --no-auto-commit:

1. Doctor gastown threshold tests used raw db.ExecContext for speed, but
   without explicit transactions the inserts were rolled back on connection
   close, causing "No duplicate issues" instead of detecting duplicates.
   Fix: wrap inserts in BEGIN/COMMIT.

2. TestOpenFromConfig_ServerModeFailsWithoutServer expected connection
   failure to a free port, but BEADS_TEST_MODE=1 caused applyConfigDefaults
   to override the config port with BEADS_DOLT_PORT (the test server),
   so the connection succeeded. Fix: temporarily unset the env vars.

Closes: bd-vg7zi

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
